005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Volts;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.Follower;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.MotorAlignmentValue;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Motors;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.util.LoggedSignals;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.util.SysId;
019import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
020import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
022import java.util.Optional;
023
024public class ShooterImpl extends Shooter {
025
026    private final TalonFX shooterMotorLeft;
027
028    private final TalonFX shooterMotorCenter;
029
030    private final TalonFX shooterMotorRight;
031
032    private final VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC shooterController;
033
034    private final Follower shooterFollowerController;
035
036    private final LoggedSignals signals;
037
038    private Optional<Voltage> voltageOverride;
039
040    public ShooterImpl() {
041        // leader
042        shooterMotorRight = new TalonFX(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT, Settings.CANBUS);
043        shooterMotorCenter = new TalonFX(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER, Settings.CANBUS);
044        shooterMotorLeft = new TalonFX(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT, Settings.CANBUS);
045        shooterController = new VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC(getState().getTargetAngularVelocity());
046        signals = new LoggedSignals(LoggedSignals.SignalLocation.CANIVORE, "Shooter/")
047                .withMotor(
048                        "Right Motor",
049                        shooterMotorRight.getSupplyCurrent(),
050                        shooterMotorRight.getStatorCurrent(),
051                        shooterMotorRight.getVelocity())
052                .withMotor(
053                        "Center Motor",
054                        shooterMotorCenter.getSupplyCurrent(),
055                        shooterMotorCenter.getStatorCurrent(),
056                        shooterMotorCenter.getVelocity())
057                .withMotor(
058                        "Left Motor",
059                        shooterMotorLeft.getSupplyCurrent(),
060                        shooterMotorLeft.getStatorCurrent(),
061                        shooterMotorLeft.getVelocity());
062        // configure
063        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT.configure(shooterMotorRight);
064        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER.configure(shooterMotorCenter);
065        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT.configure(shooterMotorLeft);
066        // Set center and left to follow right
067        shooterFollowerController = new Follower(shooterMotorRight.getDeviceID(), MotorAlignmentValue.Opposed);
068        shooterMotorCenter.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
069        shooterMotorLeft.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
070        voltageOverride = Optional.empty();
071    }
072
073    @Override
074    public void setVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage) {
075        this.voltageOverride = Optional.of(voltage);
076    }
077
078    @Override
079    public AngularVelocity getCurrentAngularVelocity() {
080        return shooterMotorRight.getVelocity().getValue();
081    }
082
083    @Override
084    protected void stopMotors() {
085        shooterMotorRight.stopMotor();
086        shooterMotorCenter.stopMotor();
087        shooterMotorLeft.stopMotor();
088        shooterMotorCenter.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
089        shooterMotorLeft.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
090    }
091
092    @Override
093    public void periodic() {
094        if (!Settings.EnabledSubsystems.SHOOTER.get()) {
095            stopMotors();
096            return;
097        }
098        if (voltageOverride.isPresent()) {
099            shooterMotorRight.setVoltage(voltageOverride.get().in(Volts));
100            return;
101        }
102        final AngularVelocity targetAngularVelocity = getState().getTargetAngularVelocity();
103        final VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC shooterControl = shooterController.withVelocity(targetAngularVelocity);
104        shooterMotorRight.setControl(shooterControl);
105        this.signals.logAll();
106        super.periodic();
107    }
108
109    @Override
110    public SysIdRoutine getShooterSysIdRoutine() {
111        return SysId.getRoutine(
112                Settings.Shooter.RAMP_RATE,
113                Settings.Shooter.STEP_VOLTAGE,
114                "Shooter",
115                this::setVoltageOverride,
116                () -> shooterMotorRight.getPosition().getValue(),
117                () -> shooterMotorRight.getVelocity().getValue(),
118                () -> shooterMotorRight.getMotorVoltage().getValue(),
119                getInstance());
120    }
121}
